atfPropertyHighlights.name: Sparkling clean
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests have rated this property 9.1/10 on cleanliness

atfPropertyHighlights.name: Top Value
atfPropertyHighlights.tooltip: Guests rated this property 9.2/10 on value for money

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers car park free of charge. Strategically situated in Banda Aceh, allowing you access and proximity to local attractions and sights. This 4.5-star property features restaurant to make your stay more indulgent and memorable.

details.title: Infant 0-1 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 2-7 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 8 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Good location. In the city centre. Near to the main tourist attraction, shops, restaurant & local market. Friendly staff. Helped me to rent motorcycle/scooter. Room is clean. Bathroom & toilet inside the room. Very clean. Love this hotel.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: 1 traveler found this review helpful. Did you?
comments.responseText: Hi Leo, Thanks for staying with us, see you next time
comments.reviewComments: This little is in a pretty good location in the town.  The clean room is small but modern with tv, aircon, towel and good hot shower(Bring your own toiletries).  short walk to the local market and night food market.  Good for short stay!
comments.reviewTitle: A small inn in good location!

comments.reviewComments: Clean and comfortable accommodation near souvenir places. Just a walking distance to the culinary center of Banda Aceh.

Penginapan yg bersih dan nyaman
Dekat dekat tempat2 souvenir/oleh-oleh. Cukup berjalan kaki di pusat kuliner banda aceh
